title: anisomeles indica var. mollissima
intro: Anisomeles indica var. mollissima is a plant species, also known as hairy anisomele, which belongs to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Anisomeles indica var. mollissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments.
